evals.prompt: I want to add live chat to our SaaS pricing page to convert more visitors into demos. What tool should I use?
evals.expected_output: Comparison of live chat tools with recommendation based on SaaS sales use case

assertions.name: compares_tools
assertions.description: Response must compare at least 3 live chat tools (e.g., Intercom, HubSpot, Drift, Brevo)

assertions.name: pricing_page_strategy
assertions.description: Response must include strategy for proactive chat on pricing pages

assertions.name: demo_booking
assertions.description: Response must address how to convert chat conversations into booked demos

evals.prompt: How do I build a chatbot flow that qualifies leads and books meetings when our sales team is offline?
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step chatbot flow design with qualification questions, routing logic, and meeting booking

assertions.name: qualification_questions
assertions.description: Response must include specific qualifying questions to ask visitors (2-3 max)

assertions.name: offline_handling
assertions.description: Response must address what happens when no agents are available

assertions.name: meeting_booking
assertions.description: Response must explain how to integrate calendar booking into the chatbot flow

evals.prompt: We're using Brevo and want to set up live chat on our website. How do I configure Conversations?
evals.expected_output: Guide to setting up Brevo Conversations with widget installation, agent config, and automated messages

assertions.name: widget_installation
assertions.description: Response must explain installing the Brevo chat JavaScript snippet

assertions.name: automated_messages
assertions.description: Response must cover setting up automated/proactive messages based on visitor behavior

assertions.name: contact_sync
assertions.description: Response must mention that chat contacts sync to Brevo's contact database
